metadata.description: DPU EduBot Knowledge Base - 4 layer architecture
metadata.layer_0: Personal ERP data - NEVER answer, always redirect to ERP or Mentor
metadata.layer_1: Verified FAQ doc - applies to ALL enrolled learners
metadata.layer_2: Batch-specific - MBA Jan26 Sem1 and BBA Jan26 Sem1

attendance.message: Your attendance details are on the LMS portal. Please log in to LMS and check your course progress section.
attendance.label: Open LMS Portal

fees.message: Your semester-wise fee details, pending amounts, and payment receipts are on ERP under the Payments section.
fees.label: Open ERP Payments

result.message: Results are on ERP under the Examination section once declared by the university.
result.label: Open ERP Examination

admit_card.message: Your admit card is on ERP — Examination — Filled Exam Form — Admit Card column.
admit_card.label: Open ERP Examination

assignment_status.message: Check your submission status on ERP — Assignments — Assignment History tab.
assignment_status.label: Open ERP Assignments

profile.message: Your ERP Student ID, PRN, program details and mentor info are all on ERP under My Profile.
profile.label: Open My Profile on ERP

mentor.message: Your assigned mentor's name and email are on ERP — My Profile — scroll to Mentor Details section. Contact them via WhatsApp or email during working hours (10am to 6pm).
mentor.label: View Mentor Details on ERP

Accounts: Fees, Loan Not Mapped Or Updated
Academic: Recording Of Session Not Uploaded In LMS

faqs.q: What is the Welcome Email?
faqs.a: An official email from the Student Section containing your ERP login credentials and portal link. Sent after successful completion of your admission process.

faqs.q: I have not received the Welcome Email. What should I do?
faqs.a: Ensure your admission process is fully completed. Also check your spam folder. If the issue persists, contact your counsellor.

faqs.q: What is the Mentor Introduction Email?
faqs.a: An official email from your assigned mentor sharing their contact details and the WhatsApp community link.

faqs.q: What are Login Credentials?
faqs.a: Your User ID and password to access the ERP portal. These are provided in your Welcome Email from the Student Section.

faqs.q: How do I log in to the ERP student portal?
faqs.a: Visit col5.dpuerp.in and use your User ID and password from the Welcome Email.

faqs.q: What if I forget my ERP login details?
faqs.a: Use the Forgot Password option on the ERP login page. If that does not work, contact your mentor.

faqs.q: I cannot log in to ERP. What should I do?
faqs.a: Check your credentials and internet connection. If still not working, contact your mentor during working hours (10am to 6pm).

faqs.q: What is the ERP portal?
faqs.a: ERP is your official student support system for all academic and administrative activities including fee payment, examination, assignments, and accessing LMS.

faqs.q: What is the difference between Student ID and PRN?
faqs.a: Student ID is your ERP ID assigned by the college system. PRN (Permanent Registration Number) is your university registration number generated after document verification and admission confirmation.

faqs.q: When will I receive my PRN number?
faqs.a: PRN is generated after document verification and admission confirmation by the university.

faqs.q: What is the LMS portal?
faqs.a: LMS (Learning Management System) at collms.dpuerp.in is the platform for your lectures, study materials, e-books, case studies, recorded sessions, and practice assessments.

faqs.q: Where can I find the LMS portal?
faqs.a: On ERP, click My Courses in the left menu. It will redirect you to LMS via Single Sign-On (SSO) directly into your enrolled courses.

faqs.q: When will I get LMS access?
faqs.a: LMS access is provided after your fees are successfully paid and admission is confirmed.

faqs.q: What are Live Sessions?
faqs.a: Real-time online classes conducted by faculty or subject experts at scheduled times. You can interact, ask questions, and participate just like a classroom.

faqs.q: How do I join a live lecture?
faqs.a: Lecture join links are available on your LMS portal. Click the link at the scheduled time.

faqs.q: What if I miss a lecture?
faqs.a: Recorded sessions are available on LMS and can be accessed any time. However, attending live sessions is important for your attendance record.

faqs.q: Is attendance compulsory?
faqs.a: Yes. Regular attendance is expected and is monitored by the academic team through LMS participation in live sessions.

faqs.q: How is my attendance tracked?
faqs.a: Once you log in to LMS and participate in live sessions, your attendance is automatically monitored. You can check your attendance status on the LMS portal.

faqs.q: How can I improve my attendance?
faqs.a: Regularly attend live sessions on LMS, join on time, and stay for the full duration. Watching recorded sessions helps with learning but does NOT count for attendance.

faqs.q: Can I download study materials from LMS?
faqs.a: Yes. E-books and PPTs are available for download from LMS.

faqs.q: Are lecture recordings available?
faqs.a: Yes. Most lectures are recorded and uploaded to LMS. You can access and watch them at any time.

faqs.q: Can I access LMS from mobile?
faqs.a: Yes. LMS is accessible via mobile browser or app. Google Chrome or updated browsers work best.

faqs.q: Which browser is best for LMS?
faqs.a: Google Chrome or any updated browser is recommended for the best LMS experience.

faqs.q: Where will I find the program syllabus?
faqs.a: The syllabus is available on LMS under your respective course or subject section.

faqs.q: What if lecture recordings are not visible on LMS?
faqs.a: Raise a support ticket: Category — Academic | Nature of Support — Recording Of Session Not Uploaded In LMS.

faqs.q: What if LMS is not opening?
faqs.a: Check your browser compatibility and internet connection. Use Google Chrome. If it still does not work, raise a support ticket under Academic category.

faqs.q: What is EDX?
faqs.a: EDX is an online platform offering free courses from international universities with certifications. These are valuable for career advancement and your resume. You will receive a separate link via email from EDX.

faqs.q: Are live lectures compulsory?
faqs.a: Yes, attending live sessions is strongly recommended as attendance is tracked through your LMS participation.

faqs.q: Where can I find my assignments?
faqs.a: Your assignments are available on ERP portal under the Assignments section in the left menu.

faqs.q: How do I submit assignments?
faqs.a: Go to ERP — Assignments — New Assignments. Complete Assignment 1 and Assignment 2 for each subject (formative assignments), then click Submit Assignment for final submission. Once submitted, editing is NOT allowed.

faqs.q: Is assignment submission mandatory?
faqs.a: Yes. Assignment submission is mandatory and assignments are an important part of evaluation contributing to your overall marks.

faqs.q: Are assignments counted in the final result?
faqs.a: Yes. Formative Assessment (assignments and internal) carries 30 marks. Summative Assessment (term-end exam) carries 70 marks. Total is 100 marks per subject.

faqs.q: What is the last date to submit assignments?
faqs.a: The assignment deadline is mentioned on your ERP portal under the Assignments section for each subject.

faqs.q: What happens if I miss the assignment deadline?
faqs.a: Late submissions may not be accepted. Ensure you submit within the mentioned deadline shown on ERP.

faqs.q: Can I edit my assignment after submission?
faqs.a: No. Once you submit your assignment on ERP, editing is not allowed.

faqs.q: Will I get confirmation after submitting my assignment?
faqs.a: Yes. You will receive confirmation after successfully submitting assignments on the ERP portal.

faqs.q: What if my assignments are not visible on ERP?
faqs.a: Contact your mentor immediately. You can also raise a support ticket: Category — Academic | Nature of Support — Assignment Related.

faqs.q: Is doing an internship at industry/corporate/organisation mandatory for the project?
faqs.a: No, internship is not mandatory but is highly recommended for practical exposure. If not possible, you can work on a relevant research topic for preparing a project report based on secondary data, in consultation with your internal guide appointed by the institute.

faqs.q: What is the minimum duration of an internship?
faqs.a: Minimum 6 to 8 weeks to ensure sufficient learning and data collection.

faqs.q: I am a working student. Can I do the internship at my current place of work?
faqs.a: Yes, you can do the internship at your current workplace. However, you need to produce an internship completion certificate from the organisation in the format prescribed by the institute.

faqs.q: What documents are required for internship confirmation?
faqs.a: An internship offer letter is helpful but it is not mandatory.

faqs.q: How can I find internship opportunities?
faqs.a: You can find internships through job portals, your own networking, the university placement cell, or by directly contacting organizations relevant to your domain.

faqs.q: Can I do a virtual internship?
faqs.a: Yes, virtual internships are available through Qollabb — DPU's partner organization that provides industry-relevant projects with experienced industry mentors. You can work on real-world challenges remotely while enhancing your professional profile.

faqs.q: What is the correct format for the project report?
faqs.a: Follow the prescribed structure: Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, Data Analysis, Findings, Recommendations and Conclusion. Recordings explaining the format are available on LMS.

faqs.q: In which format should the project report be uploaded?
faqs.a: Submit the project report in PDF format only.

faqs.q: What happens if I miss the project report submission deadline?
faqs.a: If you miss the project report deadline, your project will be deferred to the next exam cycle, and you will be marked absent for the current one.

faqs.q: Where should I submit my final project report soft copy (PDF file)?
faqs.a: Upload your final project report PDF on the ERP portal within the specified deadline. The deadline is declared from time to time and informed via email and displayed on the portal.

faqs.q: Where should I send my final project report black book (hard copy)?
faqs.a: Send the project report black book hard copy to: Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth Centre for Online Learning, Sant Tukaram Nagar, Pimpri, Pune - 411018, Maharashtra, India. Kind Attention: (Name of your mentor). In case of difficulty in courier delivery, contact 020-27805700/59.

faqs.q: Is submitting a project report black book (hard copy) mandatory?
faqs.a: Yes, submitting the project report black book hard copy is mandatory. Non-submission may result in incomplete or absent remarks on your mark sheet. The project will be considered complete only after receipt of the hard copy.

faqs.q: How do I improve the quality of my project report?
faqs.a: To improve quality: use authentic data sources, ensure logical flow and clarity, proofread for grammar and formatting errors, and strictly follow university guidelines.

faqs.q: What are the guidelines for preparing the project PPT?
faqs.a: The project PPT structure is: Slide 1 - Title of project, Name of learner with ERP ID and PRN Number | Slide 2 - Project objectives | Slide 3 - Research Methodology (type of research, sampling method, population, sample size, data collection method) | Slides 4-8 - Data Analysis and presentation | Slide 9 - Findings, recommendations and conclusion | Slide 10 - Bibliography.

faqs.q: How many pages should the project report be?
faqs.a: The project report should ideally be 40 to 80 pages, and not more than 120 pages.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample copy of the project report and PPT?
faqs.a: Yes, sample copies of the project report and PPT are uploaded on the LMS as applicable for your specialization.

faqs.q: Is project work compulsory?
faqs.a: Yes, the project is a compulsory course carrying 8 credits and is assessed for 200 marks.

faqs.q: Is this a group project or an individual project?
faqs.a: It is an individual project to be completed by each learner individually. It is NOT a group project.

faqs.q: Is the project a research project or an internship project?
faqs.a: It is an internship project. However, if you have done research work, you can include it in your project report.

faqs.q: How should I communicate with my project supervisor?
faqs.a: Communication with your project supervisor through email is preferred.

faqs.q: How long does the project supervisor take to respond?
faqs.a: Depending on availability, expect a response within 3 working days. Supervisors try to respond as early as possible.

faqs.q: Which type of queries should I address to my project supervisor?
faqs.a: Most information and resources for the internship and project report are available on LMS. Anything beyond what is covered in LMS, or queries requiring personalised solutions, should be addressed to your project supervisor. Administrative queries unrelated to research should be addressed through your mentor.

faqs.q: Where can I look for project guidance other than my supervisor?
faqs.a: Go through the LMS Research Project Report course at course code OMBC 405. It contains in-depth information for preparing the project report based on research carried out. All required formats for ERP submission are available for download and use as templates on LMS.

faqs.q: How can I pay my semester fees?
faqs.a: Log in to ERP — Payments — Course Fees Payment. Accept terms and conditions, select payment type, enter amount, and click Pay Now via DPU Payment Gateway.

faqs.q: What payment modes are available?
faqs.a: Credit Card, Debit Card, Net Banking, and UPI. All payments are online only. No offline payment is accepted.

faqs.q: Can I pay in installments?
faqs.a: Yes. Fees are paid semester-wise. Partial payment within a semester is also allowed.

faqs.q: What is the total MBA fee structure?
faqs.a: MBA total fee is Rs 1,89,400 across 4 semesters — Semester 1: Rs 50,000 | Semester 2: Rs 50,000 | Semester 3: Rs 45,000 | Semester 4: Rs 44,400.

faqs.q: What happens if I do not pay fees on time?
faqs.a: You will lose LMS access, books will not be dispatched, and you will not be eligible for examinations.

faqs.q: Will I get LMS access without paying fees?
faqs.a: No. LMS access is provided only after confirmation of fee payment or loan approval.

faqs.q: Where can I download my payment receipt?
faqs.a: Log in to ERP — Payments section. You can view and download your receipt from the receipts table on the right side.

faqs.q: What if my payment fails?
faqs.a: Retry using another payment method. If amount was deducted but not reflected, wait at least 2 hours before retrying. Share your transaction proof with your mentor for mapping.

faqs.q: What is a UTR number?
faqs.a: UTR (Unique Transaction Reference) is your payment reference number. It is needed for payment mapping if the payment is not reflected in ERP.

faqs.q: What if payment is deducted but not reflected in ERP?
faqs.a: Wait at least 2 hours. If still not updated, share payment proof with your mentor. Also raise a support ticket: Category — Accounts | Nature — Fees, Loan Not Mapped Or Updated.

faqs.q: Can I apply for an education loan?
faqs.a: Yes. Check ERP — Payments — Apply for Loan for available loan options and the application process.

faqs.q: Will books be sent if fees are not paid?
faqs.a: No. Study materials and books are dispatched only after fee payment or loan approval is confirmed.

faqs.q: Will I get fee payment reminders?
faqs.a: Yes. You will receive fee payment reminders via email, SMS, and notifications on the ERP portal.

faqs.q: How will I know when exam forms are available?
faqs.a: You will receive notification via email and WhatsApp when exam forms are released.

faqs.q: Where do I fill my exam form?
faqs.a: Log in to ERP — Examination section. New Exam Forms will appear there when released.

faqs.q: Is filling the exam form mandatory?
faqs.a: Yes. Without submitting the exam form you will not be eligible to appear for examinations.

faqs.q: Can my mentor fill the exam form for me?
faqs.a: No. You must fill and submit the exam form yourself through the ERP portal.

faqs.q: Are exams proctored?
faqs.a: Yes. Term-end examinations are proctored. Your activity is monitored through webcam, microphone, and system tracking during the exam.

faqs.q: What is a mock test and is it compulsory?
faqs.a: Mock tests are conducted 3 days before the actual exam to help you practice and check technical readiness. Attending is strongly recommended.

faqs.q: What device should I use for the exam?
faqs.a: A laptop is preferred. Mobile is also allowed. Ensure you have a stable high-speed internet connection.

faqs.q: What if internet disconnects during exam?
faqs.a: Reconnect immediately and continue the exam. If you face login issues, contact the technical support team immediately.

faqs.q: What if I miss the exam?
faqs.a: If you miss the exam, you may need to apply for a backlog exam in the next semester.

faqs.q: What is a backlog or ATKT?
faqs.a: ATKT (Allowed To Keep Terms) means you have backlog subjects — subjects you did not clear. You can appear for backlog exams conducted along with regular semester examinations. An additional fee is applicable.

faqs.q: How do I apply for a backlog exam?
faqs.a: Apply by filling out the exam form for the respective subject through the ERP portal. An additional fee is applicable for backlog exams.

faqs.q: When are exam results declared?
faqs.a: Results are declared as per the schedule provided by the University Examination Department. You will be notified and can check results on ERP — Examination section.

faqs.q: Will I get a physical copy of my result?
faqs.a: Yes. A hard copy of your result will be sent to your registered postal address via courier. Ensure your address is up to date on ERP.

faqs.q: What is the marks weightage?
faqs.a: Formative Assessment (assignments and internal) = 30 marks. Summative Assessment (term-end exam) = 70 marks. Total = 100 marks per subject.

faqs.q: When will my study materials and books be dispatched?
faqs.a: Books are dispatched after fee payment confirmation and address verification.

faqs.q: How can I track my book delivery?
faqs.a: You will receive an email with tracking details once books are dispatched. Contact your mentor if you need further tracking help.

faqs.q: I have not received my books. What should I do?
faqs.a: Inform your mentor for tracking or re-dispatch. Also raise a support ticket: Category — Dispatch | Nature of Support — Books Delivery Issue.

faqs.q: Will I receive books every semester?
faqs.a: Yes. Books are sent each semester after fee payment for that semester is confirmed.

faqs.q: What is RTO?
faqs.a: RTO means Return To Origin — delivery failed, usually due to incorrect or incomplete address. Your mentor will coordinate re-dispatch. Re-dispatch charges apply if the error is from your side.

faqs.q: What if books are damaged or incomplete?
faqs.a: Report immediately to your mentor for replacement.

faqs.q: What MBA specializations are available?
faqs.a: Marketing, HR, Finance, IT, Project Management, Operations, Business Analytics, Digital Marketing, AI and ML, FinTech, International Business, Shipping and Logistics Management, and others.

faqs.q: How do I select my specialization?
faqs.a: Through a pop-up on your ERP portal. You must complete this selection within the given timeline to proceed with assignments and exam form submission.

faqs.q: Can I change my specialization?
faqs.a: Yes but only once and within the allowed timeline. The first change is free. Subsequent changes may attract a fee. Cannot be changed after exam form submission.

faqs.q: What is the deadline for specialization selection?
faqs.a: Usually one month before exam form release. You will receive weekly reminders via email and WhatsApp.

faqs.q: What if I do not select specialization on time?
faqs.a: You cannot proceed with assignments or exam form submission. Specialization selection is mandatory and cannot be skipped.

faqs.q: Can I change specialization after exam form submission?
faqs.a: No. Once the exam form is submitted, specialization cannot be changed. Select carefully.

faqs.q: What is the role of a mentor?
faqs.a: Your mentor is your primary point of contact for academic processes, issue resolution, and ensuring smooth progress throughout the program.

faqs.q: What are mentor working hours?
faqs.a: 10am to 6pm on working days.

faqs.q: What if my mentor is not responding?
faqs.a: Raise a support ticket: Category — Students Section | Nature of Support — Mentor Response Issue.

faqs.q: How quickly will my issue be resolved?
faqs.a: Issues are generally resolved within 24 to 72 hours depending on the type.

faqs.q: How do I raise a support ticket?
faqs.a: Log in to ERP — Student Support Ticket in the left menu. Select Support Category and Nature of Support, describe your issue in detail, attach a file if needed (PDF JPG PNG only), and click Save.

faqs.q: My payment failed or is not reflected. Which ticket do I raise?
faqs.a: Category: Accounts | Nature of Support: Online Fee Payment Issues. Attach your transaction proof.

faqs.q: My fee receipt has an issue. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Accounts | Nature: Issues Related To Fee Receipt.

faqs.q: Fees or loan not mapped in ERP. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Accounts | Nature: Fees, Loan Not Mapped Or Updated.

faqs.q: I want a refund. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Accounts | Nature: Excess Fees Refund.

faqs.q: Lecture recording not uploaded on LMS. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Academic | Nature: Recording Of Session Not Uploaded In LMS.

faqs.q: LMS content or books issue. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Academic | Nature: Content Related (LMS, Books).

faqs.q: Assignment issue. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Academic | Nature: Assignment Related.

faqs.q: Session issue. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Academic | Nature: Session Related.

faqs.q: Project issue. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Academic | Nature: Project Related.

faqs.q: Exam form or hall ticket issue. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Examination | Nature: Exam Form & Hall Ticket Related.

faqs.q: Result issue or wrong marks. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Examination | Nature: Result Related.

faqs.q: Exam login credential issue. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Examination | Nature: Exam Login Credential.

faqs.q: Exam timetable issue. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Examination | Nature: Exam Time Table Related.

faqs.q: Need Bonafide Certificate. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Students Section | Nature: Bonafide Certificate Request.

faqs.q: Need Letter of Recommendation (LOR). Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Students Section | Nature: Letter Of Recommendation.

faqs.q: Need Medium of Instruction (MOI) certificate. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Students Section | Nature: Letter For Medium Of Instruction.

faqs.q: Need Fee Structure Letter. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Students Section | Nature: Fee Structure Letter Request.

faqs.q: Name correction needed. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Students Section | Nature: Name Correction In Marksheet. Required documents: Gazette copy AND Government Registered Marriage Certificate. Notarized affidavits are NOT accepted.

faqs.q: Need duplicate marksheet. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Students Section | Nature: Duplicate Marksheet.

faqs.q: Books not delivered. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Dispatch | Nature: Books Delivery Issue.

faqs.q: Marksheet not delivered. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Dispatch | Nature: Marksheet Delivery Issue.

faqs.q: Mentor not responding. Which ticket?
faqs.a: Category: Students Section | Nature: Mentor Response Issue.

faqs.q: How do I update my mobile number?
faqs.a: ERP — My Profile — click Communication Details button — update your mobile number.

faqs.q: How do I update my email ID?
faqs.a: ERP — My Profile — click Communication Details button — update your email ID.

faqs.q: How do I update my address?
faqs.a: ERP — My Profile. A pop-up appears for address update or update directly from the My Profile section.

faqs.q: How do I update my photo?
faqs.a: Raise a support ticket: Category — Students Section | Nature — Photo And Signature Update.

faqs.q: How do I change my name in ERP?
faqs.a: Raise a support ticket: Category — Students Section | Nature — Name Correction In Marksheet. Required: Government Registered Marriage Certificate AND Gazette copy. Notarized affidavits are NOT accepted.

faqs.q: When is convocation held?
faqs.a: Convocation is usually held in May or June. Official communication will inform you in advance.

faqs.q: What if I cannot attend convocation?
faqs.a: Your degree will be couriered to your registered postal address if you do not attend.

faqs.q: How do I get my transcript?
faqs.a: After course completion, apply for transcripts through the alumni portal.

faqs.q: Will I have LMS access after completing the program?
faqs.a: No. LMS access is deactivated after course completion as per university policy.

faqs.q: Is there job assistance available?
faqs.a: Yes. Job assistance and placement guidance may be available. Contact the placement team for further details.

fee_structure.note: Partial payment allowed within a semester.

important_dates.specialization_deadline: To be announced - check ERP and WhatsApp group
important_dates.assignment_deadline: To be announced - check ERP Assignments section
important_dates.exam_form_release: To be announced - you will get email and WhatsApp notification
important_dates.end_sem_exam: To be announced - check ERP Examination section
important_dates.result_declaration: To be announced by University Examination Department

fee_structure.note: Please update BBA fee structure via Admin panel or knowledge_base.json

important_dates.note: Please upload BBA Jan 26 academic calendar via Admin panel

key_topics: Programs offered: Online MBA, Online MCA, Online BBA, Certificate Courses
MBA eligibility: Bachelor degree with minimum 50% marks (45% for reserved categories)
BBA eligibility: HSC 10+2 in any stream or equivalent from a recognized board
MBA duration: 2 years (4 semesters). Validity: 4 years
MCA duration: 2 years. BBA duration: 3 years
Accreditations: UGC recognized, AICTE approved, DEB approved, NAAC A++ accreditation, Category-I Deemed University, NIRF ranked
E-Resources available: J-Gate, eShodh Sindhu, Shodh Ganga, OPAC
EDX courses available to students via separate email link
